examples: During the long journey, they wore wooden kneepad to protect their knees, kowtow every three steps until them arrived in Lhasa.
This paper designs a kneepad that can undertake parts of weights for the knee joints, and elaborates it in detail of the work principle.
The results showed that OA kneepad could delay cataplasia of articular cartilage by inhibiting cytokines and adjusting biological effect of MMP-3, HA.
